description: Style Note Add a desi dimension to your global-glam ensemble with this lovely pair of earrings from royal diadem. A statement piece is a fashion essential - style this with minimal additional accessories for maximum effect. This pair packs a definite ethnic punch which means you can use this to dress up a simple salwar suit or a monochrome sari. Invest in this pair and you'll find that the statement jewellery trend will outlast the season. Product Details Golden coloured earringsTear drop shaped base, has a green coloured stone in the centre and pearl like beads surrounding it Jhumka (bell shaped dangler) with pearl like beads at the intersection, has green stone design detail on top of the jhumka and pearl like beads around it and a green tear drop shaped stone hanging from the centre of the jhumka Push back closureMaterial and Care Metal Wipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 65 mm
